ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Permanently delete all items in trash?
ast.target: 永久删除回收站中的所有项目？

ast.name: error

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Portals replaces the default file explorer on startup. The file explorer remains accessible via commands or Obsidian tabs.
ast.target: Portals 在启动时将替换默认的文件资源管理器。文件资源管理器仍可通过命令或 Obsidian 标签页访问。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduce vertical spacing, summary heights in the folder or tag tree. Does not apply to side portal.
ast.target: 减少文件夹或标签树中的垂直间距和摘要高度。不适用于侧边门户。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a visual theme for file tree and list items in side portal.
ast.target: 为侧边门户中的文件树和列表项选择视觉主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to apply active tab colors to the file area.
ast.target: 选择如何将活动标签页颜色应用到文件区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make folder names and tag group names bold in the file tree.
ast.target: 在文件树中将文件夹名称和标签组名称设为粗体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display extension badge on non-markdown files. When turned on, non-markdown files do not show extension after file name.
ast.target: 在非 Markdown 文件上显示扩展名徽章。开启后，非 Markdown 文件在文件名后不显示扩展名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tooltips on each file item in explorer. Shows word count, last modified and name when truncated.
ast.target: 在资源管理器中为每个文件项显示工具提示。当名称被截断时，显示字数、最后修改时间和名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to show quick-add icons on folder & tag rows. Hover reveal on desktop, directly on mobile.
ast.target: 选择如何在文件夹和标签行上显示快速添加图标。桌面端悬停时显示，移动端直接显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a snippet of file text under the file name in folder or tag tree
ast.target: 在文件夹或标签树中，在文件名下方显示文件文本的片段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tags (in folder portals) or parent folder (in tag portals) below the file preview.
ast.target: 在文件预览下方显示标签（在文件夹门户中）或父文件夹（在标签门户中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show sections within each folder or tag to organise sub items into separated sections
ast.target: 在每个文件夹或标签内显示分区，以将子项组织到不同的分区中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reduce padding and font size for portal, side portal tabs and stack headers.
ast.target: 减少门户、侧边门户标签页和堆栈标题的内边距和字体大小。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how tab names are shown. Tooltips appear on hover only when names are hidden.
ast.target: 控制标签页名称的显示方式。仅当名称隐藏时，悬停时才会出现工具提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the icon to the left or right of the tab name or side portal name. Disabled with tab name display is icon only.
ast.target: 将图标放置在标签页名称或侧边门户名称的左侧或右侧。当标签页名称显示为仅图标时禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shows a badge to denote assigned tab number for quick switching using command or hotkeys
ast.target: 显示徽章以表示分配的标签页编号，以便使用命令或快捷键快速切换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tab color on bottom borders of active tabs. Portals style uses the same color when enabled. The color of the pinned vault root is used in side portals.
ast.target: 在活动标签页的底部边框上显示标签页颜色。启用后，Portals 样式使用相同的颜色。侧边门户中使用固定的保险库根颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show vault root as a pinned tab (always with a left border). Users can customize its icon and color below.
ast.target: 将保险库根显示为固定标签页（始终带有左边框）。用户可以在下方自定义其图标和颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize icon and color for the vault root tab.
ast.target: 自定义保险库根标签页的图标和颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a folder or tag as a portal tab.
ast.target: 将文件夹或标签添加为门户标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show only the stack icon; the name will appear in a tooltip on hover.
ast.target: 仅显示堆栈图标；名称将在悬停时出现在工具提示中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the icon to the left or right of the stack name. Disabled with stack name is hidden.
ast.target: 将图标放置在堆栈名称的左侧或右侧。当堆栈名称隐藏时禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to display the number of portals inside a stack.
ast.target: 何时显示堆栈内的门户数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use colors on stack icon, app accent or user defined. When turned off, stack icons use default color like tab icons.
ast.target: 在堆栈图标上使用颜色，应用强调色或用户自定义颜色。关闭时，堆栈图标使用默认颜色，如标签页图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When expanding a stack, automatically collapse other open stacks.
ast.target: 展开堆栈时，自动折叠其他已打开的堆栈。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a collapsible panel at the bottom with additional tabs.
ast.target: 在底部显示一个可折叠的面板，其中包含额外的标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which tabs appear in the side portal.
ast.target: 选择哪些标签页出现在侧边门户中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide side portal on mobile devices.
ast.target: 在移动设备上隐藏侧边门户。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, context notes are treated as normal files and the side portal shows a notice. Menu items, context note listeners and cache are removed.
ast.target: 禁用时，上下文笔记将被视为普通文件，侧边门户会显示通知。菜单项、上下文笔记监听器和缓存将被移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag notes storage folder. After changing folder path, use the "Migrate" button to move the files.
ast.target: 标签笔记存储文件夹。更改文件夹路径后，请使用“迁移”按钮移动文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When context notes are enabled, controls if they appear in file/ tag tree. If contexts notes are disabled, this setting has no effect.
ast.target: 当上下文笔记启用时，控制它们是否出现在文件/标签树中。如果上下文笔记被禁用，此设置无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to visually indicate folders and tags that have a context note.
ast.target: 如何视觉指示具有上下文笔记的文件夹和标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking the icon of a folder or tag will open its context note in the current tab.
ast.target: 启用后，点击文件夹或标签的图标将在当前标签页中打开其上下文笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Side portal shows context note for the active file's nearest ancestor folder (folder spaces only). Falls back to portal's context note if none found.
ast.target: 侧边门户显示活动文件最近祖先文件夹的上下文笔记（仅限文件夹空间）。如果未找到，则回退到门户的上下文笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose date format used in daily note filenames. The format must match for journal to work consistently. Changes require a reload.
ast.target: 选择日记文件名中使用的日期格式。格式必须匹配，日记才能正常工作。更改需要重新加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder containing daily notes. Type the path or choose from the list. Leave empty to use the folder from the Daily Notes core plugin.
ast.target: 包含日记的文件夹。输入路径或从列表中选择。留空以使用日记核心插件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Symbols used to mark quotes in your notes. Changes made to selected quotes or symbols will reflect after Obsidian reload.
ast.target: 用于标记笔记中引文的符号。对选定引文或符号的更改将在 Obsidian 重新加载后生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a journal tab for default display, requires Obsidian reload.
ast.target: 选择默认显示的日记标签页，需要重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a small icon to journal date cards that contain at least one quote.
ast.target: 在包含至少一条引文的日记日期卡片上添加一个小图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show current property value on list of files filtered by properties.
ast.target: 在按属性筛选的文件列表上显示当前属性值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the count display of files filtered in properties. The number is based on dropdown choices.
ast.target: 隐藏按属性筛选的文件计数显示。该数字基于下拉选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Icon library only defines the icons for plugin's native elements.
ast.target: 图标库仅定义插件原生元素的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export your current portals configuration as a JSON file.
ast.target: 将您当前的门户配置导出为 JSON 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load settings from a JSON file. This will replace your current configuration.
ast.target: 从 JSON 文件加载设置。这将替换您当前的配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create timestamped settings backup on Obsidian start. Cloud icon saves it to local storage instead of data.json. This can help prevent sync conflicts on quick switching devices.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时创建带时间戳的设置备份。云图标将其保存到本地存储而不是 data.json。这有助于防止在快速切换设备时出现同步冲突。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder keeps 3 backups, removes older ones. Leave the folder empty to save in the vault root.
ast.target: 该文件夹保留 3 个备份，删除较旧的备份。将文件夹留空以保存在保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove portal tabs for folders or tags that no longer exist. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 移除不再存在的文件夹或标签的门户标签页。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the full documentation, the guide covers everything about the plugin.
ast.target: 打开完整文档，该指南涵盖了插件的所有内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: See the release notes, stay upto date on the latest changes made to the plugin.
ast.target: 查看发布说明，了解插件的最新更改。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Replace file explorer in left sidebar
ast.target: 替换左侧边栏中的文件资源管理器

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 非 Markdown 文件的扩展名徽章

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在移动端禁用侧边门户

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show context notes in file tree
ast.target: 在文件树中显示上下文笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从图标打开上下文笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示最近的上下文笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show quote indicator on date cards
ast.target: 在日期卡片上显示引文指示器

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No quotes from this day in previous months of this year, or from this date & month in the last 10 years.
ast.target: 本月或过去10年同月同日的笔记中未找到引文。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No quotes found in marked notes, or no marked notes found. Right-click a journal card to mark it, make sure it has quotes with delimiter defined in settings.
ast.target: 在标记的笔记中未找到引文，或未找到标记的笔记。右键点击日记卡片进行标记，并确保其中包含在设置中定义了分隔符的引文。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No quotes found. Please link your daily notes folder in settings & mark text in daily note files using the delimeter that you selected in settings.
ast.target: 未找到引文。请在设置中链接您的每日笔记文件夹，并使用您在设置中选择的分隔符在每日笔记文件中标记文本。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 新建带上下文的文件夹

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Portals: data.json not found for backup
ast.target: 门户：未找到用于备份的 data.json 文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select atleast one folder or tag.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个文件夹或标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This tag is already a portal.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This folder is already a portal.
ast.target: 此文件夹已是一个门户。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to save icon - check console of details
ast.target: 保存图标失败 - 请检查控制台获取详情

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Context note already exists. Opening it.
ast.target: 上下文笔记已存在。正在打开它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Tag note already exists. Opening it.
ast.target: 标签笔记已存在。正在打开它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selected items are not in a common parent folder
ast.target: 所选项目不在同一个父文件夹中

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No context note for this item
ast.target: 此项目没有上下文笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No context note exists for this item. Shift+Click to create.
ast.target: 此项目没有上下文笔记。按住 Shift 键点击可创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select a folder space first.
ast.target: 请先选择一个文件夹空间。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selected space is not a valid folder.
ast.target: 所选空间不是一个有效的文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please select at least one tab.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个标签页。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Select at least one Markdown file.
ast.target: 请至少选择一个 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find the children container.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No sub‑folders or sub-tags to reorder.
ast.target: 没有可重新排序的子文件夹或子标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已重置所选项目的颜色

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已重置所选项目的图标

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法将文件夹移动到其自身内部

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Changes will take effect after restarting Obsidian.
ast.target: 更改将在重启 Obsidian 后生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No tag notes found to migrate.
ast.target: 未找到可迁移的标签笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Portals view must be open first for all other commands to work.
ast.target: 必须先打开门户视图，其他所有命令才能正常工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault root portal is not available. Enable "pinned vault" in settings.
ast.target: 库根门户不可用。请在设置中启用“固定库”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No previous portal to switch to.
ast.target: 没有可切换的上一个门户。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Portals: Auto backup failed - check console.
ast.target: 门户：自动备份失败 - 请检查控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Old and new folder paths are the same. Nothing to migrate.
ast.target: 新旧文件夹路径相同。无需迁移。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Portals: Auto backup failed – check console.
ast.target: 门户：自动备份失败 – 请检查控制台。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换资源管理器中的分区

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换资源管理器中的文件预览

ast.name: name
ast.target: 堆叠所有未堆叠的门户标签页

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source:
Paste YAML here, e.g.
Status: active
Priority: 2
ast.target: 在此处粘贴 YAML，例如\n状态：活跃\n优先级：2

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Leave empty to use default name

ast.name: text
ast.source: No Favorites marked yet. Click the star next to any icon to add it here.
ast.target: 尚未标记收藏。单击任何图标旁边的星标即可将其添加到此处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Assign a number for tab quick switch commands & hotkey access
ast.target: 为标签页快速切换命令和热键访问分配一个数字

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click to apply, double-click to edit, right-click to reset.
ast.target: 单击应用，双击编辑，右键单击重置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ensure type on new items, ignore on existing items:
ast.target: 确保新项目类型，忽略现有项目：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use "paste to files" to apply YAML input, not "save".
ast.target: 使用“粘贴到文件”来应用 YAML 输入，而不是“保存”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select property from dropdown to view matching files.
ast.target: 从下拉菜单中选择属性以查看匹配的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The bookmarks core plugin is not enabled. Settings → core plugins.
ast.target: 书签核心插件未启用。设置 → 核心插件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No files with this tag or its subtags.
ast.target: 没有带有此标签或其子标签的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有带有此标签的文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: At least one must be selected to enable side portal.
ast.target: 必须至少选择一个才能启用侧边门户。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No portals configured. Add some in settings.
ast.target: 未配置门户。请在设置中添加一些。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Context notes are disabled. Enable them in settings.
ast.target: 上下文笔记已禁用。请在设置中启用它们。
